sentence: 这座古老的圣殿每天都有人来参观。
pinyin: Zhè zuò gǔlǎo de shèngdiàn měitiān dōu yǒu rén lái cānguān.
english: This ancient temple receives visitors every day.

sentence: 她的订婚戒指是白金镶钻的。
pinyin: Tā de dìnghūn jièzhi shì báijīn xiāng zuàn de.
english: Her engagement ring is platinum set with diamonds.

sentence: 请把这些文件按日期归类。
pinyin: Qǐng bǎ zhèxiē wénjiàn àn rìqī guīlèi.
english: Please categorize these documents by date.

sentence: 这条陆上输油管线连接了两个城市。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo lùshàng shū yóu guǎnxiàn liánjiē le liǎng gè chéngshì.
english: This land-based oil pipeline connects two cities.

sentence: 他脾气不好，总是喜欢找麻烦。
pinyin: Tā píqì bù hǎo, zǒngshì xǐhuān zhǎo máfan.
english: He has a bad temper and is always looking for trouble.
